text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simple word recognition by enabling machines to grasp the meaning and context behind text understanding. For example, NLP powers translation tools that can convert entire sentences between languages almost instantly. Another common use is sentiment analysis, which allows companies to automatically detect whether customer reviews are positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, you encounter NLP every day when using chatbots. These programs use NLP to interpret your questions and provide helpful responses, making them increasingly useful for customer support and online shopping.
